headline: Manhattan Associates and Genuine Parts Company Go Live with Next-Generation Warehouse Management System in Brisbane
summary: Manhattan Associates Inc. (NASDAQ: MANH) and Genuine Parts Company (GPC) have announced the successful go-live of Manhattan Active® Warehouse Management at GPC's Brisbane distribution centre. The go-live represents the culmination of a large-scale program to modernise GPC's DC operations, replacing different legacy systems and manual processes with a unified, cloud-native platform designed to improve visibility, efficiency and scalability across its network.
